strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance distributed systems
Current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, directly relevant to agentic AI platform development
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as founder of GISCollective and a track record of public knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: Current and historical titles are Senior/Staff Software Engineer — substantial gap from the Director-level IC seniority this role requires
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; educational background is a CS bachelor's and a fine arts degree with no graduate-level ML or AI credentials
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or executive stakeholders on AI/cloud strategy at scale; the profile is that of a practitioner, not a strategic advisor

key_factors.factor: No advanced AI credentials or strategic advisory record

response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile engineer with genuine current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, and his founding and open-source work show initiative beyond pure execution. However, this role demands a Director-level individual contributor who can advise C-suite customers, shape cloud and AI platform strategy, and inspire cross-organizational transformation — responsibilities that require a track record well beyond staff-level engineering. Bogdan's profile shows no evidence of executive advisory engagements, AI product leadership at scale, or the organizational influence expected at the principal/director tier. The seniority gap alone is disqualifying for this specific opening.
